subcodes.first_line: O servant of Truth! In this Day the divine Call hath been raised. Well is it with the soul that hath attained unto its hearing and turned to the most exalted horizon [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده حق امروز ندای الهی مرتفع نیکوست حال نفسی که به اصغاء فائز شد و بافق اعلی
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @chastisement and requital, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day
